Haulage HMRC fuel-duty.text: 2022 red-diesel reform removed off-road entitlement for haulage

Construction retention.text: retentions being banned; loss is insolvency-driven

AI subscription spend-audit.text: funded incumbents already ship SaaS-spend management

Care-home council fee.text: councils chronically under-funded; payer can't pay

Generic AI meal-planner.text: saturated consumer category, no acute pain

Unified-API niche bridge.text: proven pattern; moat = un-shortcuttable integration work

Construction smash-and-grab.text: solvent payer + statutory adjudication forcing mechanism

Construction Statutory Adjudication Arbi.text: Statutory adjudication is a mandatory legal right for construction contracts in the UK, providing a forcing mechanism for payment.

Illegal LinkedIn Scraping Hub.text: scraping LinkedIn violates section 8.2 of the User Agreement; it is a breach of contract and illegal under CFAA.

Niche Dental Practice CRM (<3 staff).text: Small dental practices with <3 staff are ignored by enterprise CRM vendors like Salesforce, creating a gap for vertical tools.

Generic E-commerce Platform for SMBs.text: Shopify and Amazon already own 90% of the small-seller e-commerce market; incumbency is total.
